title: oraios/serena: semantic coding tools for AI agents
friendlyTitle: Serena helps AI coding agents understand and edit a codebase
summary: Serena is an MCP toolkit that gives coding agents semantic code retrieval and editing capabilities across a project. The repository is trending with roughly 26,800 GitHub stars at publication time.
friendlySummary: Serena gives compatible AI agents better tools for finding and changing the right parts of a software project.
whyItMatters: Developers can connect compatible assistants to code-aware navigation and precise symbol-level editing instead of relying only on full-file reads. Try it in a disposable branch first and keep tests and code review around agent-made changes.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can reduce unnecessary file reading and make edits more precise. Use a safe branch and review every important change.
